name: No-Calorie Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a pint jar.
2. Cover tightly.
3. Shake vigorously.
4. Store in refrigerator.
5. Shake before using.
Values per serving: No carbohydrates, protein, fat, or calories at all!! Sodium value in 2 tablespoons is 133 mg with salt. Food Exchange per serving: This is a "free" dressing.
